title: Assembly.Load should be preferred
description: "Assembly.Load" should be used instead of Assembly.LoadFrom, Assembly.LoadFile, or Assembly.LoadWithPartialName. These alternative methods can lead to loading unintended assemblies and security vulnerabilities. The parameter to Assembly.Load includes the full specification of the dll to be loaded, ensuring predictable behavior.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

compliant: Assembly.Load("MyAssembly"); // Compliant - loads with full specification

// Exception: within AssemblyResolve event handler
Assembly.LoadFrom(path); // Compliant in this context

checks.message: Use Assembly.Load() instead of Assembly.LoadFrom(), Assembly.LoadFile(), or Assembly.LoadWithPartialName() for security reasons.
